programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Nurse Elle and Dr Steve suspect a cyclist with a badly broken leg is being far too brave and could be masking other injuries. Dr Michelle puts lunch on hold as she and Dr Jonathan examine a 67-year-old motorbike rider for broken bones.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Flight paramedic Steve heads to the country after a tractor topples over and crushes a farmer. Taz and Erika hope for the best as a much-loved grandma collapses. A woman having multiple seizures has Michaela and Simon on high alert.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
